## What & why

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the issue: Closes #NNN -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `ci` is green (check, lint, build, external-URL guard, unit tests, PR-title lint)
- [ ] No external URLs / no new runtime network calls (offline invariant holds)
- [ ] New third-party assets recorded in `CREDITS.md` with license + source
- [ ] If content: `review_status` set correctly; doctrine is verbatim; owner review requested
- [ ] Docs/roadmap updated if behaviour or scope changed
